# addresses are runtime; message-id/queue mapping in SMU-HANDLERS.md

    FUN_00000fa8(param_1,0xff);
    return;

    return;

    FUN_00024e9c();

      FUN_00000fa8(param_1,0xff);
      return;

    FUN_00024eb4();

}
